channel.title: command line on Blog of Jason Meridth
channel.description: Recent content in command line on Blog of Jason Meridth

item.title: Using sed and regex to Remove Prefix on Filenames
item.description: I used wp2md recently to generate markdown files out of my wordpress posts so that I could migrate to a static blog generator (like Nikola, the one I chose to use on this blog).

item.title: Dell Information Via Command Line
item.description: To get your Dell Service Tag from your workstation/laptop via command line:

item.title: Bash_profile vs Bashrc
item.description: .bash_profile is sourced everytime you login to a bash shell either locally on the terminal or remotely via ssh

item.title: Testing Mail From the Command Line on Ubuntu
item.description: Install mailutils sudo apt-get install mailutils Send some test piped into the mail command
